vendor: AT&T Bell Labs / The Open Group
notes: Multi-user time-sharing OS; forks include Solaris, HP-UX, AIX, IRIX; largely displaced by Linux in enterprise
Sun SPARC/x86 UNIX; renamed Oracle Solaris post-2010 acquisition; moribund under Oracle
Scalable Processor Architecture RISC CPU family; Oracle ended SPARC development 2017
